title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Category Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
